title: Senior Software Engineer - Cropin - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cropin - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Cropin invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cropin:
Cropin is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin!
